---
title: "Approved genAI Tools at OSU"
author: Derek Ditmer
format: revealjs
number-sections: false
---

# Hi, I am Derek

## Platform Engineer

![Derek OTDI](/img/me.png)

---

## Approved GenAI Tools

1. <https://ai.osu.edu/>
2. Resources for Buckeyes
3. Approved Tools

---

## Web Based tools

- ### Adobe
  - <https://firefly.osu.edu>
- ### Google
  - <https://gemini.google.com>
  - <https://notebooklm.google.com/>
- ### Microsoft
  - <https://copilot.microsoft.com>

---

## Cloud Vendors

- ### Google Cloude Platform (GCP)
  - Gemini
- ### Amazon Web Services (AWS)
  - Anthropic Claude, Nova, Kimi, Deepseek
  - Coming soon: openai, grok, and Anthropic Fable 5
- ### Microsoft Azure
  - OpenAI GPT

---

## OSU GenAI Service

### Created for Builders, Developers & Researchers

![GenAI service, user on laptop accessing various LLMs on GCP, Azure, and AWS cloud](/img/image.png)
<https://go.osu.edu/get-genai>

---

## Model Access

![List of models available on GenAI service](/img/image-1.png)
<https://go.osu.edu/api-fluency>

---

## Basic usage

- OpenAI protocol
- API key - sk-XXXXXXXXXX
- custom endpoint -- <https://litellm.cloud.osu.edu>

## Features

- team budgets
- generate api keys
- set api budget, expiration, and model access

---

## GenAI integrations

- <https://colab.osu.edu>
- claude code cli
- claude desktop as via 3rd party mode
- ide integration with continue
- any software with custom endpoint/api key

---

## AWS Kiro

- <https://kiro.dev>
- requires OSU AWS account
- monthly subscription based access to Claude
- kiro web ui, cli, and IDE
  ![Kiro Logo](/img/image-2.png)
  ![alt text](/img/image-4.png)

---

## Carmen AI Assistant

<https://firefly.cloud.osu.edu>
![alt text](/img/image-3.png)
